title: nepeta mariae
intro: Nepeta mariae, also known as Catmint or Mary's mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Nepeta mariae include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. Nepeta mariae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its calming and soothing effects.
